name: Microsoft
confidenceReason: Enterprise software and cloud computing monopoly. Unparalleled B2B distribution network and AI infrastructure leadership via Azure/OpenAI.

screener.note: DEPLOY override: base CAGR 58% >= 15% and stabilized

bullCase: Microsoft is the infrastructure layer for enterprise AI — Azure is growing 29% YoY and accelerating as Copilot for M365 and GitHub Copilot begin generating material revenue at $30+/seat. Office 365 pricing power continues with AI-tier upsells. The OpenAI equity stake provides uncapped upside from AGI development. 95%+ recurring revenue base.
bearCase: Azure growth faces increasing competition from Google Cloud (BigQuery, Vertex AI) and AWS as hyperscaler lock-in weakens with multi-cloud adoption. Copilot enterprise adoption has been slower than Wall Street expected as enterprises navigate AI governance policies. At 21x forward PE, Microsoft trades at a premium that requires sustained 14%+ EPS growth.
description: Microsoft Corporation develops and supports software, services, devices, and solutions worldwide.
